content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Monetize Your Dev Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to monetize your dev skills. Learn to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build high-value, production-ready AI applications for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: Monetization starts with shipping production-grade code, not just tutorials. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you gain an autonomous engineering force multiplier. This setup allows you to rapidly iterate, debug, and deploy complex AI features, transforming your student projects into high-value SaaS assets that command real-world market interest.
content.intro:
The gap between building a 'to-do list' app and a revenue-generating SaaS is paved with technical friction. You are stuck in the loop of learning syntax rather than engineering outcomes, leaving your skills trapped in a cycle of academic exercises. It is a frustrating reality: you have the logic, but you lack the velocity to ship products that people actually pay for.

Today, we break that cycle. By mastering the intersection of Claude Code’s autonomous reasoning and Antigravity’s rapid scaffolding, you will stop being a student who writes code and start being an AI Builder who orchestrates systems. This is your blueprint for transforming raw potential into a portfolio that speaks the universal language of ROI.

steps.title: Architecting the Monetizable MVP
steps.description: Define a high-value problem and structure your project scope to ensure it solves a real business pain point, not just a classroom requirement.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the market for micro-SaaS tools. Generate a project architecture for a niche AI-powered automation tool that solves a specific business problem, including database schema and API endpoints.

steps.title: Rapid Scaffolding with Claude Code
steps.description: Initialize your project structure with best-practice patterns to ensure scalability from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a boilerplate structure for a production-ready Node.js/TypeScript backend with Prisma, Express, and secure authentication middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate the project file structure and install necessary dependencies for a TypeScript backend.'

steps.title: Implementing Core AI Logic
steps.description: Integrate Claude's reasoning capabilities into your application logic to provide unique, automated value to your users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service layer for an AI-powered data processing module that interfaces with the Anthropic API, including robust error handling and rate limiting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Implement the AI processing service module using the Anthropic SDK with robust error handling.'

steps.title: Automated Testing and Validation
steps.description: Ensure your code is production-grade by automating your test suite, which builds confidence for potential users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit and integration tests using Jest and Supertest for the core authentication and AI processing endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Write comprehensive unit tests for the newly created services and ensure 90% coverage.'

steps.title: Deployment and Monetization Pipeline
steps.description: Set up your CI/CD and payment integration so your project is ready to accept users and scale instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow for automated deployment to Vercel and integrate a Stripe checkout session flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Set up the Stripe integration flow and generate the CI/CD pipeline configuration file.'

pro_tips: Always use Claude Code to document your code as you write it; a well-documented repo is worth 2x more in a job interview.
Force Claude Code to optimize for latency rather than just feature density to keep your SaaS costs low.
Use Antigravity to perform a 'Security Audit' on your codebase before every deployment to prevent vulnerabilities.
Implement a 'Feature Flag' system early so you can iterate on paid features without breaking the core free experience.
Treat your GitHub repo as a product landing page; use Claude Code to write a professional README that highlights business value, not just tech stack.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, focus on gathering feedback from one real user. Use Claude Code to analyze user logs and iterate on the features that provide the most immediate value.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical roadmap to transition from a student to an AI Builder who ships revenue-generating products. Don't let your code sit in a private repository—take these steps, deploy your solution, and start building your reputation. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
